title: Anna University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Anna University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Anna University has officially declared the TANCET Result 2026 on May 22, 2026. The results for MBA, MCA, M.E, M.Tech, M.Arch, and M.Plan entrance examinations for the 2026 academic session are now available online at the official TANCET portal, tancet.annauniv.edu.

content.text: Anna University has officially released the TANCET Result 2026 for the Tamil Nadu Common Entrance Test conducted for the 2026 academic session for various postgraduate courses. The result includes scorecards for PG programs such as MBA, MCA, M.E, M.Tech, M.Arch, and M.Plan, enabling candidates to check their entrance test performance for admission to affiliated colleges in Tamil Nadu.

Anna University Result 2026 has been announced online on the official website - tancet.annauniv.edu. Candidates can log in using their registered email ID or login ID and password to download their TANCET 2026 scorecard and verify their marks and qualifying status. After downloading the result, students are advised to carefully check their name, registration number, marks, and other details, and contact Anna University or the TANCET helpdesk immediately in case of any discrepancy.

Anna University has published the TANCET Result 2026 for the PG entrance examination held for admission to MBA, MCA, and other postgraduate professional courses for the 2026 academic session. The results are available online in the form of digital scorecards that candidates can download using their login credentials from the official TANCET website. Students must use these scorecards for further admission and counselling processes as notified by Anna University and the Directorate of Technical Education.

rows: State-level PG entrance examination for MBA, MCA, M.E, M.Tech, M.Arch, M.Plan
MBA, MCA, M.E, M.Tech, M.Arch, M.Plan (PG programmes)
Registered email ID / login ID and password

content.text: Anna University has activated the direct link for TANCET Result 2026 so that candidates can quickly access their PG entrance scorecard online. By using the official TANCET result link, MBA, MCA and other PG aspirants can view and download their marks and print a copy for future admission and counselling processes. Students are advised to use only the official portal to avoid any incorrect or unofficial information and to ensure the security of their login credentials.

links.label: TANCET Result 2026 - Anna University PG Entrance

content.text: Candidates can follow the step-by-step process given below to check and download their TANCET Result 2026 online from the official Anna University TANCET portal.

items: Visit the official TANCET website at https://tancet.annauniv.edu/.
On the homepage, click on the link for "TANCET Result 2026" or "TANCET 2026 Marksheet / Scorecard".
You will be redirected to the result login page.
Enter your registered email ID or login ID and password in the respective fields.
Click on the "Login" or "Submit" button to access your TANCET 2026 result dashboard.
View your TANCET scorecard showing your marks and qualifying status.
Click on the download or print option to save your TANCET Result 2026 for future reference.

structured_links.label: TANCET Result 2026 - Anna University PG Entrance
